expectations.text: Recognizes auditEvent as a transactional / continuously-growing table
expectations.evidence: 'table of tens of millions of rows that grows daily'

expectations.text: Flags the missing time/date window (no bound on createdAt) and recommends one on an indexed column
expectations.evidence: Flags unbounded result + likely-missing (type,createdAt) index, but never recommends bounding the query by a date/time window; the smell-#4 framing is absent

expectations.text: Flags the absence of a take/limit (unbounded result set) and recommends pagination (cursor/keyset or take)
expectations.evidence: Blocking issue 1: no take; mandatory capped cursor pagination

expectations.text: Flags over-fetching via include (user + metadata) and recommends selecting only needed fields
expectations.evidence: Issue 3: include leaks full user record; use select + DTO

expectations.text: States a tradeoff for at least one recommendation (not just the fix)
expectations.evidence: Security/DoS-oriented checklist of fixes; does not articulate the cost/downside of any recommendation (no index write-cost, no default-window behavior-change tradeoff)
